creator: patfbsd@davenulle.org
text:
Le Fri, 16 Oct 2009 21:02:07 GMT,
joshua jones <jazzy_josh_5@hotmail.com> :

> I don't know what this is, but this program is stopping me from
> getting into my new computer from a private seller. it says to login
> but I don't know any login name then says password but doesn't type
> anything when I do.

It's not a bug it's a feature! You need to know the name of your
account (ie your login) and your password. The password is never echoed
when you type it, this is normal.

I suggest you to ask for your password and your login to your seller, if
you have physical access to the computer you can reset the root account
by booting in single-user mode:

http://lantech.geekvenue.net/chucktips/jason/chuck/1002317496/index_html

Check the documentation : 
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/handbook/users.html

Please use problem report only for problems, you will find assistance
on the freebsd-questions@freebsd.org mailing list or on the FreeBSD
forums http://forums.freebsd.org

Regards.

(imho this PR can be closed)
